samples.text: Fire usually causes smoke. There is smoke coming from the building. Could there be a fire?
Smoke is commonly produced by fire. Smoke is coming out of the building. Is it possible that there is a fire?
Fires often generate smoke. The building is emitting smoke. Could a fire be present in the building?
Combustion frequently produces smoke. Smoke can be observed coming from the structure. Could combustion be occurring inside?
If smoke is observed, one possible explanation is fire. Smoke is being observed coming from the building. Could fire be one explanation?
Fire usually causes smoke. Many office buildings have elevators. There is smoke coming from the building. Could there be a fire?
